stemHtml: For a RNP 1 route A342 Z, the letter Z means that all turns shall be made within the allowable RNP tolerance of a tangential arc between the straight leg segments with a radius of…

options.a: 15 NM on the route between 30° and 90° at and below FL190.
options.b: 15 NM on the route between 30° and 90° at and above FL200.
options.c: 22.5 NM on the route between 30° and 90° at and above FL200.
options.d: 22.5 NM on the route between 30° and 90° at and below FL190.
